tasks.title: Review phenomenological bridge status
tasks.description: Assess whether the scalar branch template can be derived from a branch measure or amplitude law.

tasks.title: Design external-data likelihood adapters
tasks.description: Specify BAO and SNe adapters only after bridge equations, covariance handling, and preregistration rules are frozen.

tasks.title: Prototype perturbation-sector observables
tasks.description: Define whether the branch bridge predicts perturbation growth, matter power, or CMB-facing quantities.

tasks.title: Replace grid diagnostic with production inference
tasks.description: Add priors, sampling, coverage tests, and model-comparison protocol before external-data use.

tasks.title: Lock prospective predictions
tasks.description: Create prediction-ledger entries only after observables, data products, statistics, and rejection rules are fixed.
